item_text: if user is logged in, then go to area; else, go to login page
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-003 title: user logout module: user source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: test steps: 1. click on the "logout" button. 2. wait for the firebaseauthentication component to log out the user. 3. check if the user is logged out and redirected to the login page. expected result: the user should be logged out successfully and redirected to the login page.

item_text: if area is selected, then go to categories; else, go to home page
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-category-001 title: create category module: category source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - description: new category - name: new category name test steps: 1. click on the "create category" button. 2. enter the category description and name. 3. click on the "save" button. 4. wait for the firebaseauthentication component to validate the category creation. 5. check if the category is created successfully. expected result: the category should be created successfully and listed in the user's categories.

item_text: if category is selected, then go to reports; else, go to category list
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-category-001 title: create category module: category source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - description: new category - name: new category name test steps: 1. click on the "create category" button. 2. enter the category description and name. 3. click on the "save" button. 4. wait for the firebaseauthentication component to validate the category creation. 5. check if the category is created successfully. expected result: the category should be created successfully and listed in the user's categories.

item_text: if login is successful, then user is logged in; otherwise, show error message
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-002 title: user login module: user source pages: 2 preconditions: user is registered. test data: - email: testuser@example.com - password: testpassword123 test steps: 1. open the login form on the ui. 2. enter the email and password. 3. click on the "login" button. 4. wait for the firebaseauthentication component to validate the login. 5. check if the login is successful. expected result: the user should be logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

item_text: conferma registrazione avenuta e errore: if the registration is successful, the system confirms it; otherwise, it shows an error message.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-registration-001 title: incomplete registration data module: user source pages: 3 preconditions: test data: - username: - password: testpassword123 test steps: 1. open the registration form on the ui. 2. enter the password but leave the username field empty. 3. click on the "register" button. 4. wait for the firebaseauthentication component to validate the registration. 5. check if the registration fails due to incomplete data. expected result: the registration should fail and display an error message.

item_text: dati incompleti o errati -> dati incompleti o errati (repeated)
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-registration-001 title: incomplete registration data module: user source pages: 3 preconditions: test data: - username: - password: testpassword123 test steps: 1. open the registration form on the ui. 2. enter the password but leave the username field empty. 3. click on the "register" button. 4. wait for the firebaseauthentication component to validate the registration. 5. check if the registration fails due to incomplete data. expected result: the registration should fail and display an error message.
